examples: The jeweller was stabbed as he tried to fight the robbers off.
There were signs that she struggled with her attacker before she was stabbed.
"The matter wi' him is he's dead, stabbed," replied Cecco in a hollow voice.
Mr Myers was stabbed repeatedly while travelling on a bus in the heart of the Jewish community.
Mr Demirsay, known locally as Sharif, was stabbed after answering a knock at the door.
